title: The Road I Travel with You
actors: Heihachirô Ôkawa, Hideo Saeki, Naoyo Yamagata
plot: "The Road I Travel With You" concerns two brothers of marriageable age and their mother, a former geisha who has been set up by an absent patron in a spacious country home in Kamakura. The futures of the two boys, torn between lov...
